title: Job Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
